arts.ttl: Burnley have ‘already contacted’ club to sign player in January – Deal can be beneficial for both clubs
arts.sum: Burnley have identified Saïd Benrahma as a target to improve their squad in the winter market. That’s at least what DZ Foot are reporting, and they share more on Burnley’ desire to sign the winger. He joined Lyon from West Ham on loan in January and his stay was made permanent in the summer. arts.ttl: Scott Parker on Burnley’s midfield ‘predicament’, playing Hannibal out wide and Josh Brownhill’s scoring form
arts.sum: Scott Parker took the unusual step of naming four central midfielders in his starting XI for Burnley’s win against Watford at the weekend.
